base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of miscellaneous_screen_tiles — a tile (level_layout) from 1988 super mario bros 3. Master tile atlas of all misc UI tiles — letter-cards, N-Spade minigame tiles, coin-heaven ceiling, toad-house. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Master tile atlas of all misc UI tiles — letter-cards, N-Spade minigame tiles, coin-heaven ceiling, toad-house
